Personal Projects

Campus Eats

Campus Eats is a dining application designed to eliminate the decision fatigue around meals using student schedules, campus geography, and real-time nutrient tracking.

View LiveGitHub

Kriyarthika Arena

Kriyarthika Arena is a gamified to-do application designed to empower all users by boosting motivation, enhancing productivity, and fostering effectively time management skills.
